STM32F407 Errata Sheet

Errata ID: ES0182 Rev 12

1. ADC — Wrong conversion result when ADC channels in scan mode with DMA
   Severity: Major
   Status: Workaround
   Affected Peripherals: ADC1, ADC2, ADC3
   Affected Revisions: Rev A, Rev B
   Workaround: Disable DMA after each conversion or use polling mode.
   Fix Revision: Not planned.

2. I2C — I2C fast mode Plus (FM+) configuration issue
   Severity: Minor
   Status: Open
   Affected Peripherals: I2C1, I2C2
   Affected Revisions: All revisions
   Workaround: Use standard mode (100kHz) instead of FM+ mode.
   Fix Revision: N/A

3. SPI — Data line glitch when NSS hardware management enabled
   Severity: Critical
   Status: Fixed
   Affected Peripherals: SPI1, SPI2, SPI3
   Affected Revisions: Rev A only
   Workaround: Use software NSS management.
   Fix Revision: Rev C and later.

4. USB OTG — USB OTG FS spurious interrupt when USB cable is disconnected
   Severity: Minor
   Status: Workaround
   Affected Peripherals: USB_OTG_FS
   Affected Revisions: Rev A, Rev B, Rev C
   Workaround: Mask the USB interrupt before disconnecting the USB cable.
   Fix Revision: Not planned.
